title: Communication
description: Universal message contract used when one skill triggers communication through another skill.

from_skill.description: The skill that originated this communication

to_skill.description: The skill that should execute this communication

project.description: Project identifier this communication belongs to

priority.description: Priority level. P1 = urgent/blocking, P2 = important/this week, P3 = low/backlog

recipients.description: List of recipients (email addresses, phone numbers, or usernames)

attachments.description: File paths or URLs to attach

source_id.description: ID of the source message/event that triggered this

requires_confirmation.description: Whether user must approve before sending
